36:["$","$1","block-53",{"children":["$","h2","h2-493",{"className":"text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-white sm:text-3xl","children":["Short Submission Blurb"]}]}]
37:["$","$1","block-54",{"children":["$","p","p-498",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":["PrivateDAO is a Solana governance tooling stack for teams that need private voting without losing execution safety. It combines commit-reveal governance, treasury protections, proposal-bound proof anchoring, wallet-connected operations, Testnet lifecycle proof, preserved Devnet stress harnesses, and reviewer-visible release evidence into one reusable system. The project is already live on Testnet and is structured to mature from a governance application into production-grade Solana developer tooling."]}]}]
